mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = TBP.ID ) POST_LIKE_COUNT, CASE WHEN TBL.ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END IS_LIKED FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBL ON TBP.ID = TBL.POST_ID AND TBL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = TBP.ID ) POST_LIKE_COUNT, CASE WHEN TBL.ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END IS_LIKED FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBL ON TBP.ID = TBL.POST_ID AND TBL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} WHERE POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR POST_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, COUNT(TPL.ID) AS POST_LIKE_COUNT,
MAX(CASE WHEN TPL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS_CLICK
0 IS_CLICK
FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TPL ON TBP.ID = TPL.POST_ID GROUP BY TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME ORDER BY TBP.ID DESC
